generated_oml:
instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cart stepper motor driven by a TMC4671‑Eval controller, part of the cart horizontal motion mechanism."
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Hoist stepper motor driven by a TMC4671‑Eval controller, part of the vertical lift mechanism."
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet at the hoist end for picking up and dropping container‑representing pucks."
]

instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder mounted on the swing arm measuring pendulum motion of the hoist."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneTelemetry
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Anemometer measuring wind speed affecting crane dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneTelemetry
]

instance CartStepperMotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder on the cart stepper motor providing position feedback for horizontal motion."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneTelemetry
]

instance HoistStepperMotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder on the hoist stepper motor providing position feedback for vertical lift."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneTelemetry
]

instance CraneTelemetry : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, CartStepperMotorEncoder, HoistStepperMotorEncoder
]

instance TelemetryRecord : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series telemetry record captured by logging application and stored in TimescaleDB."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneTelemetry
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance GantryCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD geometry of the gantry crane system modeled in Autodesk Fusion360."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonRuntime
]

instance KinematicTrajectoryModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model used for optimal trajectory generation (zero‑swing trajectory)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonRuntime
]

instance CraneDynamicsSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical simulation model of the crane dynamics and controller behavior."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonRuntime
]

instance ContinuousValidationMetricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Continuous validation distance metrics comparing logged telemetry to simulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonRuntime
]

instance PythonRuntime : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.x runtime with gantrylib, providing computational support for services."
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, TrajectoryCommandService
]

instance MosquittoBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for publishing telemetry via MQTT topics."
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryCommandService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB container storing time‑series telemetry via PostgreSQL."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService, ThresholdBreachNotificationService
]

instance GrafanaDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana container for real‑time data visualization dashboards."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance DataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time data logging service writing telemetry to TimescaleDB."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataLoggingInsight
]

instance ThresholdBreachNotificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that compares logged telemetry to thresholds and publishes alerts via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:provides ThresholdBreachAlertInsight, CorrectiveActionSuggestion
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating optimal, zero‑swing trajectories based on the kinematic model."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that runs analytical simulation of crane dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that performs continuous validation by comparing telemetry with simulation."
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultSignatureInsight, ThresholdBreachAlertInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dashboard service rendering real‑time data via Grafana."
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationInsight
]

instance TrajectoryCommandService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that receives trajectory commands and forwards them to the control application over MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryCommandAction
]

instance DataLoggingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating successful storage of telemetry data in TimescaleDB."
]

instance ThresholdBreachAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight highlighting threshold breaches detected during continuous validation and alerting operators."
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing optimized, zero‑swing trajectories for load path optimization."
]

instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight containing simulation results of crane dynamics for comparison with telemetry."
]

instance FaultSignatureInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight revealing fault signatures identified by continuous validation time‑series classification."
]

instance DashboardVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight representing real‑time visualizations of telemetry data in Grafana dashboards."
]

instance CorrectiveActionSuggestion : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action suggesting corrective measures based on threshold breach alerts."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance TrajectoryCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action that sends optimized trajectory commands to the control application."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The trajectory generator service computes optimal cart and hoist trajectories (zero‑swing) and sends desired motor positions/velocities to the control application, which forwards them to the physical interface for dispatch to the TMC4671‑Eval controllers; continuous‑validation outputs deviation alerts to the dashboard but does not command the PT."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "All twin services operate in real‑time during crane operation; the logging and validation services are described as continuous, but the explicit sampling or polling rates are not specified in the documents."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Physical side: Crane, Physical Crane Interface, Control Application, Logging Application, Human Machine Interface; Digital side: Database, MQTT broker, Trajectory Generator Service, Simulation Service, Continuous Validation Service, Grafana Dashboard; communication via MQTT topics and SQL database; Docker Compose deploys all containers on a single PC."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design (CAD models in Autodesk Fusion360), Manufacturing (physical crane assembled per BOM), and Operation (runtime twin services: logging, simulation, validation, trajectory generation); the continuous‑validation service covers the operated phase and the twin evolves with research updates."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Trajectory generator guarantees zero residual swinging by analytically solving for optimal motion; continuous‑validation computes distance metrics between measured and simulated trajectories and flags deviations beyond a predefined threshold; simulation model validated against logged telemetry; all models updated during research to improve accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Data from the physical controllers are read by the Python interface over serial/USB; subsequent services communicate via an Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker; the database (TimescaleDB) is accessed over TCP/IP; the Control Application publishes motor commands, while the Trajectory Generator and Validation services publish/subscribe on MQTT topics."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Hosted locally on a personal computer (Linux/Windows) running Docker; all core services (Database, MQTT broker, Grafana) containerized, orchestration via Docker Compose; Web UI served by Grafana; gantrylib installed via pip; no external cloud deployment."
]
